paper_title: Keep the nest clean: survival advantages of corpse removal in ants
notes: LR colonies had restricted corpse removal. Results text reports 87.4 +/- 10.1% workers alive at 50 days; N=15 colonies.

paper_title: Keep the nest clean: survival advantages of corpse removal in ants
notes: FR colonies could remove corpses normally. Results text reports 94.0 +/- 7.1% workers alive at 50 days; N=15 colonies.
